channel.title: Comments on: Brooklyn Brewery Local 1, Ep. 17
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Hey Mike - the Local 1 and Local 2 can be found in Georgia pretty much anywhere good craft beer is sold. I would say most grocery stores won't have it, but I have seen it all over the state. Good luck in your search, they are both excellent beers!
item.content:encoded: Hey Mike – the Local 1 and Local 2 can be found in Georgia pretty much anywhere good craft beer is sold. I would say most grocery stores won’t have it, but I have seen it all over the state. Good luck in your search, they are both excellent beers!

item.title: By: MikeD
item.dc:creator: MikeD
item.description: Love the site guys. Is the local 1 and local 2 readily available in Georgia? I live in Alabama and can't buy bombers here. Just wondering if they would be an easy find. Thanks for the help, keep up the great beer vlogs!
item.content:encoded: Love the site guys. Is the local 1 and local 2 readily available in Georgia? I live in Alabama and can’t buy bombers here. Just wondering if they would be an easy find. Thanks for the help, keep up the great beer vlogs!

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description: I finally got around to drinking this beer and wow it is just amazing!! I can't believe how good this taste. This isn't my favorite beer but it is up there in the Top 10!!
item.content:encoded: I finally got around to drinking this beer and wow it is just amazing!! I can’t believe how good this taste. This isn’t my favorite beer but it is up there in the Top 10!!

item.title: By: Mike
item.dc:creator: Mike
item.description: The info is tremendous.. Love the site!!
item.content:encoded: The info is tremendous.. Love the site!!
